memories.content:
## Graph UI must maximize density and use all available canvas

User explicitly dislikes whitespace in the graph page. Requirement clarified:
- keep the old sidebar layout if needed
- right sidebar/details are acceptable
- but the graph/tree rendering must aggressively use the full available canvas
- dynamic resizing should consume free space as panels open/close
- "DENSITY" and "maximum fill" are the guiding UI principles for this screen
